title: Legend of The Dwerden [The Sculk Expansion]
description: Adds creatures, bosses, items, blocks, and more related to sculk.
body:
#                                                     To work you need geckolib
                     
**He hears everything...**

**Every step you take...**

**_Please note that the latest versions of the mod have a lot of content, and the mod is NOT aimed at adding 1 entity._**



This is a remake of _The Dwerden_ mod!
This mod adds a creature similar to a warden, but it is more aggressive and looks more frightening... He hears everything, so I advise you to be careful when he appears... (THIS IS NOT A DWELLER AND HAS DIFFERENT BEHAVIOR)
It will be written on the screen when it appears, so you can understand when you need to be careful. If he hears you or you are too close to him, he will attack and run after you until the music ends. If it ends, he will disappear and you will be given an achievement.
He can climb walls, go 2 blocks and even break doors, so it will not be easy to escape from him!

If The Dwerden attacks you and you break blocks, he will speed up!

**_In version 2.0.1 version you can change the Dwerden spawn delay using the /dwerden_spawn_delay command, but for it to work, you will need to re-enter the world._**


![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/898a011cda7a08337285ffa4331d4fa3d4749597.png)


There are also commands: /texture_bloody_dwerden , /texture_normal_dwerden. The first command makes the texture of all dwerdens even more frightening, and the second command returns the previous texture.



And also the commands: /dwerden_spawn_yes and /dwerden_spawn_no . They are responsible for the spawn of The Dwerden

/dwerden_config - small config of the mod!
 
If The Dwerden attacks you and you break blocks, he will speed up!
 

Legend of The Dwerden



--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

In the picture 2 in the Gallery section there is supposedly an evolution of dwerden but it is not in the game! It is made as dwerden changed during its history.

In versions 1.1.4 and earlier: You read that right! The Dwerden chase sound is taken from the game Garten of Banban 7. Thanks to the creators for the music.


In the Sculk Bull and Sculk Cow mod, version 2.0.6 is different!

Version 2.0.5 introduced a Sculk Mannequin that can parry damage inflicted on it. To destroy it, you need to hit it while holding down Shift.

There are plenty of achievements in fashion!



There are also commands: /texture_bloody_dwerden , /texture_normal_dwerden. The first command makes the texture of all dwerdens even more frightening, and the second command returns the previous texture.



And also the commands: /dwerden_spawn_yes and /dwerden_spawn_no . They are responsible for the spawn of The Dwerden

LoTD - The official abbreviation for mod.


New Mob in 1.1.3 version:


Deepborn!

Deepborn is a normal creature the size of a player but made entirely of sculk. It usually sits in the deep dark, unable to stand up, but if a player disturbs it, it will rise and begin hunting. Anyone who hits it while under any effect will lose that effect, and the effect will be passed on to the Deepborn with a certain chance and a 3-4 second cooldown.
In 1.1.4 and 1.1.5 - More mobs.
In 1.1.6 - 1 new mob.
And more and more in the following versions!

### There are about 44 mobs in total in the mod.





By making a Sculk Summoner, you can summon minions that will protect you until they die!

You can buy something from Sculk Bagman in the structure that appears on the surface.

In version 1.1.5 and highter, type "MOBS INFO" in the chat to view the information. (not available in 2.1.4 and highter)
In versions 2.1.4 and higher, type "MAW GUIDE" you can see a small hint about the boss maw! Also, starting with version 2.1.4, "MOBS INFO" WILL NOT BE AVAILABLE in the game! Deep Bestiary will be used instead.
In versions 2.1.6 and above, there are also several redstone blocks: the sculk vertical finder, which provides a redstone signal if an item or creature is within 32 blocks above it, and the sculk tactor, which provides and then removes a redstone signal every tick!



Sculk Absorber - allows you to tame it using Sculk berries, put something in its inventory, and it will follow you. It also doesn't burn like other Sculk mobs. (On fire, in lava, or in the sun, because all sculk mobs don't burn)



There are blocks in the mod, and the main one is the Deep altar, which is available in both old and new versions even lower than 1.1.0. By placing a specific block on it, you can summon a specific creature from the mod (there are about 4 options, it is not available in 1.19.2).


### List of mobs on the latest version:

- **The Dwerden**
 
- Ghost Of Warden
 
- Instigator
 
- The Dwerden's Sensor
 
- Deepborn
  
- Deepborn Brute
  
- Mite Of Dwerden
  
- The Bruiser

- Sculk Bull
  
- Sculk Stalker

- The Hound
  
- The Watcher
  
- Sculk Mannequin

- Acaԥha

- Sculk Fly.

---
BOSS:
**Maw**
 

 

Maw - This is a boss creature that is only available from version 2.1.3 and above. It consists of two stages: in the first stage, it sits still, summoning creatures, performing special attacks, and shooting or attacking from close range. In the second stage, it emerges from the ground, all the summoned creatures disappear, and it chases the player, attacking them heavily, shooting, and applying the Fear effect, which reduces the player's vision and prevents them from placing blocks or using Ender Pearls and Chorus Fruits. This is a powerful boss. Good luck!
To summon Maw, you need to activate a special block called The Awakener using sculk edge. The Awakener is located in a special structure in the sculk dimension called the Deep Arena. This block is located in the center of the structure, and its walls are made of impenetrable blocks.
